result.stdout:
Description:
  CLI tool to generate .NET SDKs from OpenAPI and AsyncAPI specifications

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  generate <input>                                              Generates client sdk using an OpenAPI or AsyncAPI spec.
  http <input>                                                  Creates .http files for a OpenAPI spec.
  cli <input>                                                   Creates CLI .cs files for a OpenAPI spec.
  docs                                                          Synchronizes documentation files from integration-test examples.
  simplify <input>                                              Simplifies OpenAPI spec.
  convert-to-openapi30 <input>                                  Converts OpenAPI 3.1 spec to OpenAPI 3.0. (Note: Microsoft.OpenApi 3.x has native OpenAPI 3.1 support, so this command may not be needed)
  init <solution-name> <client-name> <open-api-spec> <company>  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions. [, , , ]
  trim <csproj-path>                                            Validates trimming/NativeAOT compatibility for a .csproj
  ai                                                            AI subcommands.

  generate <input>                                              Generates client sdk using an OpenAPI or AsyncAPI spec.
  http <input>                                                  Creates .http files for a OpenAPI spec.
  cli <input>                                                   Creates CLI .cs files for a OpenAPI spec.
  docs                                                          Synchronizes documentation files from integration-test examples.
  simplify <input>                                              Simplifies OpenAPI spec.
  convert-to-openapi30 <input>                                  Converts OpenAPI 3.1 spec to OpenAPI 3.0. (Note: Microsoft.OpenApi 3.x has native OpenAPI 3.1 support, so this command may not be needed)
  init <solution-name> <client-name> <open-api-spec> <company>  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions. [, , , ]
  trim <csproj-path>                                            Validates trimming/NativeAOT compatibility for a .csproj
  ai                                                            AI subcommands.

  Generates OpenAPI spec from SPA HTML docs.

Arguments:
  <url>  Input url [default: https://example.com/]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output file path [default: generated.yaml]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates CLI .cs files for a OpenAPI spec.

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI cli [<input>] [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input file path

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                Output file path [default: Testing]
  -e, --exclude-deprecated-operations  Exclude deprecated operations
  --ignore-openapi-errors              Ignore OpenAPI errors
  --ignore-openapi-warnings            Ignore OpenAPI warnings
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

  Synchronizes documentation files from integration-test examples.

Commands:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Syncs README, docs pages, and MkDocs example nav.

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI docs sync [<path>] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Solution directory [default: .]

Options:
  --config <config>  Optional docs config path. Defaults to autosdk.docs.json in the solution root.
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates client sdk using an OpenAPI or AsyncAPI spec.

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI generate [<input>] [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input file path

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                                                                  Output file path [default: Generated]
  -t, --targetFramework <targetFramework>                                                                TargetFramework for the generated code [default: net10.0]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                                                                            Namespace for the generated code
  -c, --clientClassName <clientClassName>                                                                Client class name
  -m, --methodNamingConvention <MethodAndPath|OperationId|OperationIdSplit|OperationIdWithDots|Summary>  Method Naming Convention [default: OperationId]
  -s, --single-file                                                                                      Generate all models in a single file
  -e, --exclude-deprecated-operations                                                                    Exclude deprecated operations
  -e, --clsCompliantEnumPrefix <clsCompliantEnumPrefix>                                                  Prefix for enums which start with a number to make them CLS compliant. Pass empty string to disable prefixing(it will be non-CLS compliant '_') [default: x]
  --ignore-openapi-errors                                                                                Ignore OpenAPI errors
  --ignore-openapi-warnings                                                                              Ignore OpenAPI warnings
  --validation                                                                                           Generate validation methods for models
  --compute-discriminators                                                                               Compute discriminators for polymorphic models
  --generate-cli                                                                                         Generate CLI for the client
  --security-scheme <security-scheme>                                                                    Security scheme as 'Type:Location:Name' (e.g., 'ApiKey:Header:x-api-key', 'Http:Header:Bearer'). Repeatable.
  --base-url <base-url>                                                                                  Server base URL to inject (e.g., 'https://api.elevenlabs.io'). Useful for specs missing a servers field.
  --openapi-override <openapi-override>                                                                  OpenAPI override as 'path=action'. Actions: object, dictionary, remove. Repeatable.
  --websocket-class-name <websocket-class-name>                                                          Override class name for the generated WebSocket client (AsyncAPI specs only). For single-channel specs, used as the full class name. For multi-channel specs, used as a prefix (e.g., 'Deepgram' produces 'DeepgramListenV1RealtimeClient').
  --json-serializer-context <json-serializer-context>                                                    Override the JsonSerializerContext class name (default: SourceGenerationContext). Useful when generating multiple specs to the same project.
  --types-namespace <types-namespace>                                                                    Namespace to use for type references instead of the main namespace. Used for cross-namespace schema referencing where models live in a different namespace.
  --generate-models                                                                                      Generate model classes, enums, and JSON converters. Set to false when referencing types from an existing namespace via --types-namespace.
  --language <language>                                                                                  Generation backend. Currently supported: csharp. [default: csharp]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generates client sdk using an OpenAPI or AsyncAPI spec.

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI generate [<input>] [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input file path

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                                                                                  Output file path [default: Generated]
  -t, --targetFramework <targetFramework>                                                                TargetFramework for the generated code [default: net10.0]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                                                                            Namespace for the generated code
  -c, --clientClassName <clientClassName>                                                                Client class name
  -m, --methodNamingConvention <MethodAndPath|OperationId|OperationIdSplit|OperationIdWithDots|Summary>  Method Naming Convention [default: OperationId]
  -s, --single-file                                                                                      Generate all models in a single file
  -e, --exclude-deprecated-operations                                                                    Exclude deprecated operations
  -e, --clsCompliantEnumPrefix <clsCompliantEnumPrefix>                                                  Prefix for enums which start with a number to make them CLS compliant. Pass empty string to disable prefixing(it will be non-CLS compliant '_') [default: x]
  --ignore-openapi-errors                                                                                Ignore OpenAPI errors
  --ignore-openapi-warnings                                                                              Ignore OpenAPI warnings
  --validation                                                                                           Generate validation methods for models
  --compute-discriminators                                                                               Compute discriminators for polymorphic models
  --generate-cli                                                                                         Generate CLI for the client
  --security-scheme <security-scheme>                                                                    Security scheme as 'Type:Location:Name' (e.g., 'ApiKey:Header:x-api-key', 'Http:Header:Bearer'). Repeatable.
  --base-url <base-url>                                                                                  Server base URL to inject (e.g., 'https://api.elevenlabs.io'). Useful for specs missing a servers field.
  --openapi-override <openapi-override>                                                                  OpenAPI override as 'path=action'. Actions: object, dictionary, remove. Repeatable.
  --websocket-class-name <websocket-class-name>                                                          Override class name for the generated WebSocket client (AsyncAPI specs only). For single-channel specs, used as the full class name. For multi-channel specs, used as a prefix (e.g., 'Deepgram' produces 'DeepgramListenV1RealtimeClient').
  --json-serializer-context <json-serializer-context>                                                    Override the JsonSerializerContext class name (default: SourceGenerationContext). Useful when generating multiple specs to the same project.
  --types-namespace <types-namespace>                                                                    Namespace to use for type references instead of the main namespace. Used for cross-namespace schema referencing where models live in a different namespace.
  --generate-models                                                                                      Generate model classes, enums, and JSON converters. Set to false when referencing types from an existing namespace via --types-namespace.
  --language <language>                                                                                  Generation backend. Currently supported: csharp. [default: csharp]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates .http files for a OpenAPI spec.

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI http [<input>] [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input file path

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                Output file path [default: Testing]
  -s, --single-file                    Generate a single .http file
  -e, --exclude-deprecated-operations  Exclude deprecated operations
  --ignore-openapi-errors              Ignore OpenAPI errors
  --ignore-openapi-warnings            Ignore OpenAPI warnings
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

  -s, --single-file                    Generate a single .http file
  -e, --exclude-deprecated-operations  Exclude deprecated operations
  --ignore-openapi-errors              Ignore OpenAPI errors
  --ignore-openapi-warnings            Ignore OpenAPI warnings
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions.

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI init [<solution-name> [<client-name> [<open-api-spec> [<company>]]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <solution-name>  Solution name
  <client-name>    API client name
  <open-api-spec>  OpenAPI spec url
  <company>        Company name

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory
  -m, --add-mkdocs       Adds MkDocs to the solution
  -t, --add-tests        Adds integration tests to the solution
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Creates a new solution with GitHub Actions.

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI init [<solution-name> [<client-name> [<open-api-spec> [<company>]]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <solution-name>  Solution name
  <client-name>    API client name
  <open-api-spec>  OpenAPI spec url
  <company>        Company name

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory
  -m, --add-mkdocs       Adds MkDocs to the solution
  -t, --add-tests        Adds integration tests to the solution
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Validates trimming/NativeAOT compatibility for a .csproj

Usage:
  AutoSDK.CLI trim <csproj-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <csproj-path>  Path to the .csproj to validate for trimming/NativeAOT compatibility

Options:
  -t, --target-framework <target-framework>  Target framework for publish [default: net10.0]
  -r, --rid <rid>                            Runtime identifier override (e.g., linux-x64, win-x64, osx-arm64). Auto-detected if not specified.
  -v, --verbose                              Show full dotnet publish output
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -r, --rid <rid>                            Runtime identifier override (e.g., linux-x64, win-x64, osx-arm64). Auto-detected if not specified.
  -v, --verbose                              Show full dotnet publish output
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information
